dialogue.utterance: Dispatch to Unit 3 responding for a reported unconscious male at an address in [CITY].
Hello, I'm Jack, an EMT with the rescue squad. What brought you to call 911?
We found him on the bathroom floor, unconscious. He had blood in a bowel movement.
Thank you. I'll let my partner check for signs of injury. Can you step back a bit so we can assess?
Ma'am, can you open your eyes for me and tell me where you are?
I think I'm in the emergency room.
Can you tell me how old you are?
I'm 58 years old.
Ma'am, can you tell me your name again?
Rachel.

dialogue.micro_intent: head and neck exam - Pupillary reflex / Size of pupils
dialogue.utterance: Pupils are around 4mm, both equal and sluggish to light.
Your breathing is at about 16 a minute. Can you take a deep breath for me?
Yes.
Ma'am, I'm going to take your blood pressure now.
Blood pressure is 142 over 81.
Are you on any medications?
Found her on the floor, blood in the stool and confusion.

dialogue.micro_intent: S.A.M.P.L.E. - events leading up to the event
dialogue.utterance: She was near or on the toilet. Not sure exactly what happened.
Glucose is 150, so no hypoglycemia involved.
Performing a 12-lead EKG now for assessment.
Breathing is still at 16 per minute.
Pulse is 51. Slow, but strong.
SpO2 is 98%. Good.
Ma'am, what is the current date, or what day is it?
I don't know... I think I woke up here.
EKG findings are showing sinus bradycardia.
Blood pressure now is 136 over 80.
Glucose is reading 0 twice. Shall I try again in 10 minutes?
Still 0. Machine might require re-check later.
Are you currently experiencing any pain?
I'm at 0 pain right now.
Are you feeling dizzy or disoriented?
I don't feel good at all. 34. Secondary Assessment; skin exam - Color: Pallor; EMT: I notice some paleness on your skin. Any numbness or tingling sensations?
Are you currently on any medications?
I'm on metformin and glypizide.
Glor, can you insert a nasopharyngeal airway for support?
Respirations remain at 16.
NPA inserted with lubrication. Tolerated procedure well.
Her breathing has a snoring pattern at times, resolved with head tilt and chin lift.
Can you place a saline lock on the left arm?
IV started, 20G access gained on the left arm.
SpO2 is 98%. Good.
Rechecking EKG; still shows sinus bradycardia.
Any part of your body hurting more than others right now?
No, I don't have pain anywhere in particular.
When was the last time you felt stronger, when you had more energy?
Not sure. I don't have a state to compare this too.
Rechecked EKG again, still showing sinus bradycardia. 50. Secondary Assessment; skin exam - Color: Jaundice; Partner: I don't note any yellowing of the skin.

dialogue.micro_intent: head and neck exam - Gross visual examination
dialogue.utterance: None to report.
Do you have prior history with head surgeries or significant accidents?

dialogue.micro_intent: head and neck exam - Gross visual examination
dialogue.utterance: Not that I know of.
Blood pressure now is 118 over 85.
SpO2 is now at 96%.
SpO2 is at 96%. Pulse remains steady at 53.
Are you allergic to anything, like penicillin or iodine?
I'm allergic to penicillin and iodine.
Do you have any pain currently? On a scale of 0-10, what would you rate?
I'm at 0; no pain.
We're going to secure the stretcher for transport. Ready for that?
Readied for transport. No signs of distress. Good to go.
We're going to [COMPANY_NAME]. It's a short distance. Ready to move inside?
ER is approaching. I'll call in a 10-minute arrival.

dialogue.micro_intent: redo history of present illness - events leading up to the event
dialogue.utterance: Did you lose consciousness or feel lightheaded during this time?

dialogue.micro_intent: redo history of present illness - events leading up to the event
dialogue.utterance: I don't remember losing consciousness.

dialogue.micro_intent: redo history of present illness - signs and symptoms
dialogue.utterance: Did you feel like you were going to pass out before all of this?

dialogue.micro_intent: redo history of present illness - signs and symptoms
dialogue.utterance: I had a period where everything was blurry but not unconsciousness. I felt like I was going to faint.
IV secure with saline lock. Nasopharyngeal airway removed.

dialogue.micro_intent: redo history of present illness - pertinent medical history
dialogue.utterance: I understand you are on metformin and glypizide. Were you aware of any gastrointestinal symptoms before?

dialogue.micro_intent: redo history of present illness - pertinent medical history
dialogue.utterance: No, I do not recall anything like this before.
Pulse, R, SpO2 remains stable. Patient is disoriented.
Ensure the restraints are snug. Let's go with the stretcher into the ambulance.
Inside the ambulance. Secure with side rails and straps. Patient alert but not oriented.
I'll monitor vital signs for another 5 minutes before departure.
ER, we have a 58-year-old female with altered mental status and near fainting episode, GCS 13, sinus bradycardia.
EKG noted minimal LVH, possible inferior ischemia. Sluggish pupils and pallor identified.
Bowel movement with blood. No trauma, several medications are metformin and glypizide.
Blood pressure now 118 over 85 and SpO2 96. Allergies include penicillin and iodine.
Completed primary and full secondary assessments. No signs of drug use. Clear history provided.
Advised [COMPANY_NAME] for transport. Patient vitals are stable.
Let me check your pulse again now.
Pulse is 52. Still bradycardic.
Patient is alert but not oriented. No signs of distress.
